description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on release creation. The workflow should have three jobs: validate-version, build, and release. The validate-version job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.12, extracts the version from the release tag, and validates it using make validate-release. The build job uses a reusable workflow to build the project. The release job depends on build and validate-version, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.12, and publishes to PyPI using make upload with credentials from secrets.
